title: Artificial Silk Cherry Blossom Flowers Hanging Vine Garlands Home Wedding Decorations – White
features: Light weight: 0.05 kg, easy to handle and install
Artificial Silk Flower Garland, Realistic Simulated Cherry Blossom
Ideal for home decoration and weddings, creates a romantic atmosphere

Renowned Honfitat brand, ensures quality and durability
description: Product description This Honfitat Bluelover garland is ideal for adding a touch of elegance and romance to your home. Made from high quality faux silk, it features cascading white cherry blossoms, perfect for wedding decorations or simply to brighten up your home. With a light weight of 0.05 kg, this garland is easy to handle and place. It is designed for indoor use and comes in a planter, ready to display. This garland includes an artificial silk cherry blossom decoration unit and is individually wrapped. Care is simple, you just need to wipe it with a soft dry cloth to keep it beautiful. Enjoy this unique and refined home or wedding decoration, bringing the beauty of nature into your space. Safety Warning This artificial plant may contain materials that can cause skin irritation or allergic reactions. Touch them carefully and keep them away from children and pets.
